title: rubus × sessiliglandulosus
intro: Rubus × sessiliglandulosus, also known as the hybrid blackberry, is a cross between the European and American blackberry species, resulting in a unique and diverse plant with various medicinal properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus × sessiliglandulosus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in jams, jellies, and other food products due to its high nutritional value and flavor.
